title: Find Zombie Processes
description: Parse 'ps aux' output and identify zombie processes. A zombie process has 'Z' in its STAT column (column index 7, 0-based). Return the PIDs (column index 1) of all zombie processes as a sorted list of integers.
constraints: Input is ps aux output; the header line must be skipped
PID is the second column (index 1), STAT is the eighth column (index 7)
A zombie process has STAT that starts with or contains 'Z'
Return PIDs as integers in ascending sorted order
Return empty list if no zombies are found

examples.input:
USER       PID %CPU %MEM    VSZ   RSS TTY      STAT START   TIME COMMAND
root         1  0.0  0.1  19356  1544 ?        Ss   10:00   0:01 /sbin/init
www-data  1234  0.0  0.0      0     0 ?        Z    10:01   0:00 [nginx] <defunct>
www-data  5678  0.1  0.2  12345  2048 ?        S    10:02   0:05 nginx: worker
examples.explanation: Process 1234 has STAT='Z' indicating it is a zombie. Process 1 (Ss) and process 5678 (S) are not zombies.

starter_code.bash:
#!/bin/bash
# Read ps aux output from stdin, print zombie PIDs

test_cases.description: One zombie process among normal processes
test_cases.input:
USER       PID %CPU %MEM    VSZ   RSS TTY      STAT START   TIME COMMAND
root         1  0.0  0.1  19356  1544 ?        Ss   10:00   0:01 /sbin/init
www-data  1234  0.0  0.0      0     0 ?        Z    10:01   0:00 [nginx] <defunct>
www-data  5678  0.1  0.2  12345  2048 ?        S    10:02   0:05 nginx: worker

test_cases.description: No zombie processes returns empty list
test_cases.input:
USER       PID %CPU %MEM    VSZ   RSS TTY      STAT START   TIME COMMAND
root         1  0.0  0.1  19356  1544 ?        Ss   10:00   0:01 /sbin/init

test_cases.description: Two zombies and one normal process, sorted PIDs returned
test_cases.input:
USER       PID %CPU %MEM    VSZ   RSS TTY      STAT START   TIME COMMAND
root       100  0.0  0.0      0     0 ?        Z    10:00   0:00 [dead]
root       200  0.0  0.0      0     0 ?        Z    10:00   0:00 [dead2]
root       300  0.1  0.1   1000   512 ?        S    10:00   0:01 alive
